findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name CSS expression() injection bypass in AntiSamy
 * @description Check if CSS expression() or other dangerous CSS values pass through the validator
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-expression-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find places in CssValidator where dangerous CSS patterns are checked
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssValidator") and
  mc.getMethod().hasName("isValidProperty")
select mc, "CssValidator.isValidProperty call - check if expression() and other dangerous CSS values are properly blocked"
findings.hypothesis: CSS expression() injection bypass in AntiSamy CSS validator

message.text: CssValidator.isValidProperty call - check if expression() and other dangerous CSS values are properly blocked

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Dangerous string literals in CSS validation
 * @description Check for presence or absence of checks for dangerous CSS patterns like expression(), javascript:, behavior
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-missing-css-checks
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Look for string literals related to CSS attack patterns in the codebase
from StringLiteral sl
where
  sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%expression%") or
  sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%javascript%") or
  sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%behavior%") or
  sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%-moz-binding%") or
  sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%vbscript%") or
  sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%@import%") or
  sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%data:%")
select sl, "Security-sensitive CSS string literal: '" + sl.getValue() + "'"
findings.hypothesis: Missing CSS dangerous pattern checks in AntiSamy

message.text: Security-sensitive CSS string literal: 'Regular expression ''
Security-sensitive CSS string literal: 'Regular expression ''

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy DOM scanner processStyleTag and CSS in style attributes
 * @description Find how AntiSamyDOMScanner processes style tags/attributes to identify bypasses
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-style-processing
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find calls to CssScanner or CssValidator in DOM scanner
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "AntiSamyDOMScanner") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssScanner") or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssValidator") or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssHandler") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("scanInlineStyle") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("scanStyleSheet") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("processAttributes") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("checkForProhibitedAttributeValue")
  )
select mc, "DOM scanner CSS call: " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName() + "() at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: AntiSamy DOM scanner may not properly validate CSS in style attributes

message.text: DOM scanner CSS call: AntiSamyDOMScanner.processAttributes() at line 369
DOM scanner CSS call: CssScanner.scanStyleSheet() at line 414
DOM scanner CSS call: CssScanner.scanInlineStyle() at line 516

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name CssHandler URI/URL value processing - potential javascript: bypass
 * @description Check how CssHandler handles URI values in CSS properties - could allow javascript: bypass
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-uri-handling
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find calls to URIUtils or URL-related methods from within CssHandler
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssHandler")
  and (
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.util", "URIUtils") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("isValidUri") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("makeAbsolute") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getScheme") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getProtocol") or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.net", "URI") or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.net", "URL")
  )
select mc, "CssHandler URL handling at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: CssHandler may not properly validate URI schemes, allowing javascript: URI bypass in CSS url() values

message.text: CssHandler URL handling at line 310: URI.normalize
CssHandler URL handling at line 314: URI.toString
CssHandler URL handling at line 315: URI.toString
CssHandler URL handling at line 323: URI.isAbsolute

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name CssHandler missing URI scheme validation - javascript: bypass
 * @description CssHandler calls URI.isAbsolute() but may not check the scheme, allowing javascript: URIs
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-missing-scheme-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find calls to URI.isAbsolute() in CssHandler without nearby getScheme() check
from MethodCall isAbsoluteCall
where
  isAbsoluteCall.getMethod().hasName("isAbsolute") and
  isAbsoluteCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.net", "URI") and
  isAbsoluteCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssHandler") and
  // Verify there's no getScheme check in the same callable
  not exists(MethodCall schemeCheck |
    schemeCheck.getMethod().hasName("getScheme") and
    schemeCheck.getEnclosingCallable() = isAbsoluteCall.getEnclosingCallable()
  )
select isAbsoluteCall, "CssHandler calls URI.isAbsolute() at line " + isAbsoluteCall.getLocation().getStartLine() + " but does NOT call getScheme() - may allow javascript: URIs in CSS url() values"
findings.hypothesis: CssHandler uses URI.isAbsolute() without checking URI scheme - allows javascript: URIs in CSS

message.text: CssHandler calls URI.isAbsolute() at line 323 but does NOT call getScheme() - may allow javascript: URIs in CSS url() values

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy DOM scanner CSS scan result error handling
 * @description Check if DOM scanner properly handles errors from CSS scanning - bypasses when exception swallowed
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-scan-exception-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find try-catch blocks in DOM scanner that call CSS scanning methods
from TryStmt tryStmt, MethodCall cssCall, CatchClause catchClause
where
  tryStmt.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "AntiSamyDOMScanner") and
  cssCall.getEnclosingStmt().getParent*() = tryStmt.getBlock() and
  (
    cssCall.getMethod().hasName("scanInlineStyle") or
    cssCall.getMethod().hasName("scanStyleSheet") or
    cssCall.getMethod().hasName("scan")
  ) and
  catchClause = tryStmt.getACatchClause()
select catchClause, "DOM scanner catches exception from CSS scan at line " + catchClause.getLocation().getStartLine() + " after call to " + cssCall.getMethod().getName() + "() at line " + cssCall.getLocation().getStartLine() + " - verify unsafe CSS is not passed through on error"
findings.hypothesis: DOM scanner may pass through unvalidated CSS when exception occurs during CSS scanning

message.text: DOM scanner catches exception from CSS scan at line 434 after call to scanStyleSheet() at line 414 - verify unsafe CSS is not passed through on error
DOM scanner catches exception from CSS scan at line 521 after call to scanInlineStyle() at line 516 - verify unsafe CSS is not passed through on error

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy DOM scanner CSS exception - original value kept
 * @description Check if after a CSS scanning exception, the original unvalidated CSS value is kept in output
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-exception-original-value-kept
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Check the catch blocks - do they set the attribute value to empty or keep original?
from CatchClause cc, TryStmt tryStmt, MethodCall cssCall
where
  tryStmt.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "AntiSamyDOMScanner") and
  cssCall.getEnclosingStmt().getParent*() = tryStmt.getBlock() and
  (cssCall.getMethod().hasName("scanInlineStyle") or cssCall.getMethod().hasName("scanStyleSheet")) and
  cc = tryStmt.getACatchClause() and
  // Check for setAttribute calls within the catch block
  exists(MethodCall setAttr |
    setAttr.getMethod().hasName("setAttribute") or setAttr.getMethod().hasName("removeAttribute") or
    setAttr.getMethod().hasName("setNodeValue") or setAttr.getMethod().hasName("setTextContent")
    |
    setAttr.getEnclosingStmt().getParent*() = cc.getBlock()
  )
select cc, "After CSS scan exception at line " + cc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ", attribute manipulation occurs - verify original CSS is not reused"
findings.hypothesis: After CSS scanning exception, original unvalidated CSS value may be kept in output

message.text: After CSS scan exception at line 521, attribute manipulation occurs - verify original CSS is not reused

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy SVG and namespace handling - mutation XSS
 * @description Check how AntiSamy handles SVG elements and namespace confusion that could lead to mutation XSS
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-svg-namespace-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find string literals related to SVG, namespace, or MathML handling
from StringLiteral sl
where
  (
    sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%svg%") or
    sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%mathml%") or
    sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%math%") or
    sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%namespace%") or
    sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%xmlns%") or
    sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%xlink%") or
    sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%noscript%") or
    sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%style%") or
    sl.getValue().toLowerCase().matches("%script%")
  ) and
  (
    sl.getCompilationUnit().getFile().getBaseName() = "MagicSAXFilter.java" or
    sl.getCompilationUnit().getFile().getBaseName() = "AntiSamyDOMScanner.java"
  )
select sl, sl.getCompilationUnit().getFile().getBaseName() + ":" + sl.getLocation().getStartLine() + " - '" + sl.getValue() + "'"
findings.hypothesis: SVG/namespace/MathML handling may allow mutation XSS bypass

message.text: AntiSamyDOMScanner.java:214 - 'http://cyberneko.org/html/features/scanner/style/strip-cdata-delims'
AntiSamyDOMScanner.java:357 - 'style'
AntiSamyDOMScanner.java:508 - 'style'
MagicSAXFilter.java:280 - 'style'
MagicSAXFilter.java:300 - 'style'

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name MagicSAXFilter style attribute handling - CSS exception bypass
 * @description Examine how MagicSAXFilter handles CSS scanning exceptions in style attributes
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-sax-style-exception
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find try-catch around CSS scanning in MagicSAXFilter
from TryStmt tryStmt, MethodCall cssCall, CatchClause cc
where
  tryStmt.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "MagicSAXFilter") and
  cssCall.getEnclosingStmt().getParent*() = tryStmt.getBlock() and
  (
    cssCall.getMethod().hasName("scanInlineStyle") or
    cssCall.getMethod().hasName("scanStyleSheet") or
    cssCall.getMethod().hasName("scan")
  ) and
  cc = tryStmt.getACatchClause()
select cc, "MagicSAXFilter catches exception from " + cssCall.getMethod().getName() + "() at line " + cssCall.getLocation().getStartLine() + ", catch at line " + cc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: MagicSAXFilter may pass through unsafe CSS on exception

message.text: MagicSAXFilter catches exception from scanStyleSheet() at line 167, catch at line 192
MagicSAXFilter catches exception from scanInlineStyle() at line 303, catch at line 307

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy catch blocks after CSS scan - what happens to style value
 * @description Trace what value gets written to style attribute after CSS scan exception
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-catch-block-output
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find what methods are called in catch blocks after CSS scan exception in both scanners
from CatchClause cc, MethodCall mc
where
  (
    cc.getEnclosingStmt().getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "AntiSamyDOMScanner") or
    cc.getEnclosingStmt().getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "MagicSAXFilter")
  ) and
  mc.getEnclosingStmt().getParent*() = cc.getBlock() and
  cc.getLocation().getStartLine() in [192, 307, 434, 521]
select mc, cc.getEnclosingStmt().getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + 
  " catch block at line " + cc.getLocation().getStartLine() + 
  " -> " + mc.getMethod().getName() + "() at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: CSS scan exception catch blocks may write back original unsafe value to style attribute

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name CssHandler URI scheme - isAbsolute without scheme whitelist check
 * @description CssHandler calls URI.isAbsolute() but uses getScheme() nowhere in the URI handling method
 *              This can allow javascript: URIs through as they are absolute URIs
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-absolute-uri-no-scheme-whitelist
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find all calls related to URI validation in CssHandler and see if getScheme is called
from Callable uriMethod
where
  uriMethod.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssHandler") and
  // Method contains a call to URI.isAbsolute()
  exists(MethodCall isAbs |
    isAbs.getEnclosingCallable() = uriMethod and
    isAbs.getMethod().hasName("isAbsolute") and
    isAbs.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.net", "URI")
  ) and
  // But does NOT call getScheme() anywhere
  not exists(MethodCall getScheme |
    getScheme.getEnclosingCallable() = uriMethod and
    getScheme.getMethod().hasName("getScheme")
  ) and
  // And does NOT check against allowed protocols list
  not exists(MethodCall getAllowedProtocols |
    getAllowedProtocols.getEnclosingCallable() = uriMethod and
    (
      getAllowedProtocols.getMethod().hasName("getAllowedScheme") or
      getAllowedProtocols.getMethod().hasName("getAllowedProtocols") or
      getAllowedProtocols.getMethod().hasName("contains") or
      getAllowedProtocols.getMethod().hasName("startsWith")
    )
  )
select uriMethod, "CssHandler method '" + uriMethod.getName() + "' uses URI.isAbsolute() without checking the URI scheme - javascript: URIs are absolute and may pass this check"
findings.hypothesis: CssHandler accepts javascript: URIs because it only checks URI.isAbsolute() without validating the scheme

message.text: CssHandler method 'importStyle' uses URI.isAbsolute() without checking the URI scheme - javascript: URIs are absolute and may pass this check

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name CssHandler importStyle - javascript: URI allowed as absolute URI
 * @description CssHandler.importStyle calls URI.isAbsolute() to check if a stylesheet URL is absolute,
 *              but javascript: URIs are also absolute, meaning they pass this check without scheme validation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-import-style-javascript-uri
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find the importStyle method and confirm it constructs/uses the URI without scheme checking
from Method importStyle, MethodCall isAbsoluteCall, MethodCall addCall
where
  importStyle.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssHandler") and
  importStyle.hasName("importStyle") and
  isAbsoluteCall.getEnclosingCallable() = importStyle and
  isAbsoluteCall.getMethod().hasName("isAbsolute") and
  addCall.getEnclosingCallable() = importStyle and
  (addCall.getMethod().hasName("add") or addCall.getMethod().hasName("put"))
select isAbsoluteCall, "CssHandler.importStyle() at line " + isAbsoluteCall.getLocation().getStartLine() + 
  ": uses URI.isAbsolute() to classify URL as 'offsiteURL' or 'onsiteURL' without checking scheme - " +
  "javascript: URIs (e.g., javascript:alert(1)) are absolute and would be included in output as-is"
findings.hypothesis: CssHandler.importStyle() allows javascript: URIs through as they satisfy URI.isAbsolute() check

message.text: CssHandler.importStyle() at line 323: uses URI.isAbsolute() to classify URL as 'offsiteURL' or 'onsiteURL' without checking scheme - javascript: URIs (e.g., javascript:alert(1)) are absolute and would be included in output as-is

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name XMLUtil case-sensitive dangerous pattern stripping - bypass via uppercase
 * @description XMLUtil uses Pattern.compile without CASE_INSENSITIVE on content-stripping regexes
 *              allowing attackers to bypass filtering using uppercase characters
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-xmlutil-case-insensitive-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find all Pattern.compile calls in XMLUtil without CASE_INSENSITIVE flag
// And check the pattern string for dangerous keywords
from MethodCall mc, StringLiteral patternStr
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("compile") and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.regex", "Pattern") and
  mc.getNumArgument() = 1 and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.util", "XMLUtil") and
  patternStr = mc.getArgument(0)
select mc, "XMLUtil Pattern.compile at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + 
  " with pattern: '" + patternStr.getValue() + "' - NO CASE_INSENSITIVE FLAG (bypass with uppercase)"
findings.hypothesis: XMLUtil uses case-sensitive regex patterns for dangerous content stripping, allowing bypass via uppercase

message.text: XMLUtil Pattern.compile at line 35 with pattern: '>' - NO CASE_INSENSITIVE FLAG (bypass with uppercase)
XMLUtil Pattern.compile at line 36 with pattern: '<' - NO CASE_INSENSITIVE FLAG (bypass with uppercase)
XMLUtil Pattern.compile at line 37 with pattern: '"' - NO CASE_INSENSITIVE FLAG (bypass with uppercase)
XMLUtil Pattern.compile at line 38 with pattern: '&' - NO CASE_INSENSITIVE FLAG (bypass with uppercase)
XMLUtil Pattern.compile at line 40 with pattern: '>' - NO CASE_INSENSITIVE FLAG (bypass with uppercase)
XMLUtil Pattern.compile at line 41 with pattern: '<' - NO CASE_INSENSITIVE FLAG (bypass with uppercase)
XMLUtil Pattern.compile at line 42 with pattern: '"' - NO CASE_INSENSITIVE FLAG (bypass with uppercase)
XMLUtil Pattern.compile at line 43 with pattern: '&' - NO CASE_INSENSITIVE FLAG (bypass with uppercase)

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy CssHandler importStyle - @import with javascript: URI bypass
 * @description CssHandler.importStyle uses URI.isAbsolute() to validate CSS @import URLs
 *              but javascript: URIs are absolute (have a scheme), so they pass this check
 *              This allows an attacker to inject @import url(javascript:...) into CSS
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-css-import-javascript-uri-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Confirm the importStyle method structure: normalize() then isAbsolute() without getScheme()
from Method m, MethodCall normalizeCall, MethodCall isAbsoluteCall
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssHandler") and
  m.hasName("importStyle") and
  normalizeCall.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  normalizeCall.getMethod().hasName("normalize") and
  normalizeCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.net", "URI") and
  isAbsoluteCall.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  isAbsoluteCall.getMethod().hasName("isAbsolute") and
  isAbsoluteCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.net", "URI") and
  // Confirm no scheme check exists
  not exists(MethodCall schemeCall |
    schemeCall.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    schemeCall.getMethod().hasName("getScheme")
  )
select m, "CssHandler.importStyle() [lines " + m.getLocation().getStartLine() + "-" + m.getLocation().getEndLine() + "]: " +
  "validates CSS @import URLs using URI.normalize() + URI.isAbsolute() WITHOUT checking the URI scheme. " +
  "javascript: URIs satisfy isAbsolute() since they have a scheme component, allowing " +
  "@import url('javascript:alert(1)') to pass validation and be included in sanitized output. " +
  "Related to CVE-2022-28367 / bypass in AntiSamy CSS @import handling."
findings.hypothesis: CssHandler.importStyle() allows javascript: URIs via CSS @import because URI.isAbsolute() returns true for javascript: scheme

message.text: CssHandler.importStyle() \[lines 286-286\]: validates CSS @import URLs using URI.normalize() + URI.isAbsolute() WITHOUT checking the URI scheme. javascript: URIs satisfy isAbsolute() since they have a scheme component, allowing @import url('javascript:alert(1)') to pass validation and be included in sanitized output. Related to CVE-2022-28367 / bypass in AntiSamy CSS @import handling.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name URL attribute validation - javascript: and data: URI bypass
 * @description Check how URIUtils validates URLs to detect potential javascript: or data: URI bypass
 * @kind problem

 * @id java/antisamy-url-validation-bypass

import java

// Find string literals in URIUtils and Attribute validation related to URL schemes

where

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy CDATA section bypass in CSS scanner
 * @description CssScanner strips CDATA markers before scanning - check if this can be exploited
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-cdata-css-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find CDATA-related string manipulation in CssScanner
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.css", "CssScanner") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("replaceAll") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("replace") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("matches") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("find") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("group") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("matcher")
  )
select mc, "CssScanner string manipulation at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.getMethod().getName() + "()"
findings.hypothesis: CDATA stripping in CssScanner may allow bypass of CSS validation

message.text: CssScanner string manipulation at line 155: matcher()
CssScanner string manipulation at line 156: matches()
CssScanner string manipulation at line 159: group()

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy Pattern.compile flags - missing DOTALL or case-insensitive flags
 * @description Check if Pattern.compile calls in AntiSamy use proper flags to prevent regex bypass
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/antisamy-pattern-compile-flags
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find Pattern.compile calls with no flags argument
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("compile") and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.regex", "Pattern") and
  mc.getNumArgument() = 1
select mc,

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AntiSamy DOM scanner - processAttributes missing style check in certain paths
 * @description Look for places where processAttributes might skip style attribute scanning
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/antisamy-process-attributes-style-skip
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find conditional logic around "style" attribute processing in DOM scanner
from IfStmt ifStmt, StringLiteral styleLiteral
where
  ifStmt.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.owasp.validator.html.scan", "AntiSamyDOMScanner") and
  styleLiteral.getValue() = "style" and
  styleLiteral.getEnclosingStmt().getParent*() = ifStmt
select ifStmt, "DOM scanner 'style' conditional at line " + ifStmt.getLocation().getStartLine() + 
  " - verify all paths through this condition properly sanitize CSS content"
findings.hypothesis: processAttributes may skip style attribute sanitization in certain code paths
